---
title: "Feng Cheng"
toc: false
---

## Education

Ph.D. in Mathematics at the University of Washington (September 2024 – present)

Dual B.A. degrees with distinction in Mathematics and Statistics at the University of California, Berkeley (August 2022 – May 2024), with High Honors in Mathematics

Studied at the University of California, Davis (September 2020 – June 2022)

## Awards & Scholarships

Lee McFarlan Fellowship Award (2024 – 2026)

Robert Lewis Wasser Memorial Scholarship (2022)

G. Thomas Sallee Prize (2021)

## Unpublished Articles and Extended Writing Projects

-   Draft of [*From Measure to Probability: A survey of measure-theoretic results by a probabilist*](https://fredcheng02.github.io/docs/260320-from-measure-to-prob.pdf)
-   "[On the Fundamentals of Extremal Graph Theory](https://fredcheng02.github.io/docs/pioneer_paper.pdf)"

<!-- ## Teaching Material -->

<!-- Calculus (forthcoming) -->

<!-- ## Random Writings -->

<!-- -   [music musings](writings/musicmusings.qmd) -->
